title: Sentimientos: Mirta de Liniers a Estambul
original_title: Sentimientos: Mirta, de Liniers a Estambul
overview: Mirta is a university student in Buenos Aires, in the politicized Argentina of 1974. After the 1976 coup d'état, she and her boyfriend are forced into exile in Stockholm. The exile will contribute to the destruction of the couple, and Mirta must then find her own path.
